settings.heading: CRICOS Feasibility Analysis Services
settings.description: This service is ideal for registered Registered Training Organizations (RTOs) seeking to integrate international students into their training programs. We can assist you in identifying the most suitable courses to offer that will appeal to international students. Additionally, we can equip you with the necessary tools and resources to effectively market and recruit students, ensuring your efforts yield successful outcomes.

settings.heading: The first part of
settings.description: our analysis is a competitor analysis. We will review what your competitors are doing, and how you can offer unique products and services in the market. This will help you understand their strengths and weaknesses and what you need to do to differentiate yourself.

settings.heading: The next part of
settings.description: our analysis is a compliance check. We will review all documents according to National Code and ESOS requirements, ensuring that your documents are compliant with these standards. This will ensure that your recruiting efforts are compliant with the regulations and that your students are aware of their rights and responsibilities.

settings.des: We will then review your policy framework according to National Code and ESOS requirements. This will help you to ensure that your policies are up to date and comply with the requirements.
We will then review your policy framework according to National Code and ESOS requirements. This will help you to ensure that your policies are up to date and comply with the requirements.
We will then review your policy framework according to National Code and ESOS requirements. This will help you to ensure that your policies are up to date and comply with the requirements.

Finally, we will review your website to make it suitable for international students. This will ensure that your website is compliant with regulations and that it is easy to navigate and understand, is up to date and that the content is accessible to international students.
